articles.author: FRANCE 24
articles.title: EU agrees deal for deporting migrants to third-country 'return hubs' - France 24
articles.description: The European Union on Monday agreed a deal to allow countries to send migrants ordered to leave the bloc to third-country "return hubs". The legislation, which still requires formal approval by EU governments and the European Parliament, has drawn criticism f…
articles.content: European Union lawmakers and governments agreed on Monday on new rules allowing countries to deport migrants ordered to leave the bloc to centres in third countries, a move that has drawn sharp criti… [+3842 chars]
